retry_reason: kfree_skb is a put operation; retrying would cause a double-free and use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper for an skb's reference count. It unconditionally releases one reference on the skb via kfree_skb. After calling this function, the caller must not access or reuse the skb. The skb is freed when its reference count reaches zero. This function is typically used as a completion callback for HTC control packet transmission.
